metadata.title: Adrián Martínez | Software Engineering Student
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of Adrián Martínez, Software Engineering student specializing in web development and software architecture
metadata.keywords: software engineering, web development, portfolio, student, programming

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
bio: I'm a third-year Software Engineering student passionate about creating innovative solutions through code.
My journey in technology began when I was 15, and since then I've been constantly learning and improving my skills.
I specialize in web development and software architecture, with a particular interest in creating efficient and user-friendly applications.
I am also interested in artificial intelligence and machine learning, and I am currently exploring these fields.

items.title: Bachelor's in Software Engineering (Bilingual Program)
items.description: Enrolled in the bilingual program, focusing on software development, algorithms, and system architecture. Participating in various coding competitions and hackathons.

items.title: Compulsory Secondary Education (ESO)
items.description: Completed secondary education with focus on academic excellence.

items.title: Web Development Certification
items.description: Learned HTML, CSS and JS, as well as creating websites with React, Node, and MariaDB.

items.title: Cambridge English B2 Certificate
items.description: Cambridge qualification demonstrating upper-intermediate proficiency in English.

1.title: WiChat - Quiz Game Platform
1.description: Development of a web application quiz contest inspired by the TV show 'Saber y Ganar'. The platform offers real-time multiplayer gaming, timed challenges, rankings, and different question categories.

2.title: Database Management System
2.description: Implementation of a database management system (DBMS) from scratch using C++. Features include basic queries, data storage, and index optimization.

3.title: Shell
3.description: Development of a functional shell in C that supports basic commands, input/output redirection, and background process execution.

4.title: Task Manager
4.description: Web application for task management that allows users to create, edit, and organize tasks with an authentication system and a modern interface.

5.title: Information Retrieval
5.description: Information retrieval system that processes and analyzes large volumes of text to provide relevant results according to search queries.

6.title: F1 Desktop Application
6.description: Desktop application to manage and visualize information related to Formula 1, including teams, drivers, and race results.

7.title: Unreal Engine Game Project
7.description: Development of a video game using Unreal Engine, implementing game mechanics, physics systems, and interactive interfaces.

8.title: HTTP Server
8.description: Implementation of a basic HTTP server capable of handling GET and POST requests, serving static files, and processing forms.

9.title: Twitter Bot
9.description: Automated Twitter bot that interacts with users, publishes scheduled content, and collects trend data.
